diagrams.title: SDLC Phases Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows sequential flow of software development phases from requirements to maintenance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete software development journey and phase transitions

diagrams.title: Waterfall Model
diagrams.description: Linear sequential model where each phase must be completed before the next begins
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the rigid, phase-gate approach of traditional software development

diagrams.title: V-Model
diagrams.description: Extension of waterfall showing corresponding testing phases for each development phase
diagrams.purpose: Understanding relationship between development and testing activities

diagrams.title: Spiral Model
diagrams.description: Iterative risk-driven model with four phases in each spiral iteration
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing risk-driven iterative approach and how iterations build upon each other

diagrams.title: Agile Sprint Cycle
diagrams.description: Iterative sprint cycle used in Scrum framework
diagrams.purpose: Understanding iterative development in Agile methodology and continuous feedback loop

visuals.title: Software Engineering Practice
visuals.description: Visual diagram for software engineering practice
